case_title: SMUKLER HOWARD VS SAN FRANCISCO HONDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SMUKLER HOWARD AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HONDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
